runs.note: Added rate limiting to login endpoint using IP+username key with 5 attempts per 10-minute window and exponential backoff (1min/5min/15min). Successful logins reset the counter. Refresh tokens remain unaffected to preserve mobile app compatibility. Added rate limit metadata and audit logging of failed attempts.
